label: agent loop • hard context overflow ends the run with overBudget
query: Read big-data.txt in full and reproduce every line of it verbatim in your answer, then append a one-line summary at the end. Do not truncate anything.
notes: Pins the overBudget exit: with a tiny context window override, even a fully-compacted transcript cannot fit the history budget, so the driver must end the run with the distinct overBudget exit instead of sending a doomed request (or silently truncating). Deterministic — the overflow is detected at message-build time.

workspaceFiles.contents: line-001 the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog again and again without rest
